name: Matcha Donuts
method: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C) degrees. Grease a donut pan with butter or vegetable oil.
In a large mixing bowl, mix the butter, sugar, egg, baking powder, matcha powder, salt, vanilla, flour, and milk until just combined.
Transfer the batter evenly into the prepared donut pan.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until cooked through.
Let them cool. Dust with powdered sugar before serving.
While the doughnuts are cooling prepare the glaze. Mix all the glaze ingredient in a bowl and whisk until smooth. Add more or less milk to adjust the consistency.
Spread some of the glaze on the top of each cooled doughnut. Let set before serving.
